subject: Re: RFP -- Portal del Futuro (Puerto Rico)
body:
forwad to farkas


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, December 20, 2007 12:52:00 PM
Subject: FW: RFP -- Portal del Futuro (Puerto Rico)


 
 
From: fdejesus@PRIDCO.COM [mailto:fdejesus@PRIDCO.COM] 
Sent: Thursday, December 20, 2007 2:34 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: ajcolorado@msn.com; Alfonso_Martinez_Sotomayor/PRIDCO@pridco.com
Subject: RFP -- Portal del Futuro (Puerto Rico)
 

Hi Lesley, 

It was a pleasure talking with you this afternoon.  Attached for Mr. Epstein's information is the RFP and the website for Colliers Intenational where he can find information regarding the sale of parcels at the former Roosevelt Roads naval station in Ceiba, Puerto Rico.  Mr. Antonio Colorado, Executive Director, can be reached at 787-649-9426. 

Colliers website: www.roosey-roads.com 

Please send us Mr. Epstein's company name, title and address so that we can add him to the list of investors that have expressed an interest in the project. 

Feel free to contact me if you require any additional information regarding Portal del Futuro.  We also have available a Portal del Futuro Fact Sheet and a Vision Statement about the project that we can gladly forward to you. 

Regards, 

Cel Phone:787-379-2452 
Office: 787622-9433
